compile.note: Baseline execution uses a local multi-rank HCCL launch from the benchmark adapter.

limits: world_size fixed to 2 for the first seed contract
EP-only path only; TP group remains empty
local expert count fixed to 1 per rank
PTO seed uses a host-precomputed destination-major gather map plus host HCCL all_to_all_single
seed_variant.name: ep_only_top1_fp16_dispatch

tiling.strategy: destination-major local send packing with contiguous per-core token-row ownership
